content.full_text:
June 11, 1992

California Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Attention: Wayne Imberi

Dear Sir,

I retired from the Monterey County Municipal Court effective June 7, 1992. When I asked Debbie Bumgarner at the clerks office for the Leaving Office Statement, I mentioned that I would still have to file an annual statement because I was planning on sitting on judicial council assignments for more than thirty days each year.

She indicated recently to me that your office informed her that I should not file a Leaving Office Statement but to continue filing an Annual Statement as long as I accept judicial assignments of 30 days or more each year.

Would you please confirm this.

Very truly yours,

William F. Moreno

This image shows a blank sheet of paper with some visible creases and folds, likely from being handled or stored. There is no text or content on this page.
